true_desc_levels.1: Attacks the enemy.\nWhen scoring a critical hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to activate a <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attack</color> from the ally with the highest Attack.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>連携</color>を発生させる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 가장 공격력이 높은 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 발생시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人。\n发动暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使攻击力最高的友军发动<color=#28d9ed>夹攻</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks the enemy.\nWhen scoring a critical hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to activate a <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attack</color> from the ally with the highest Attack.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>連携</color>を発生させる。
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 가장 공격력이 높은 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 발생시킵니다.

true_desc_levels.5: Attacks the enemy.\nWhen scoring a critical hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to activate a <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attack</color> from the ally with the highest Attack.
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>連携</color>を発生させる。
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 가장 공격력이 높은 아군의 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 발생시킵니다.
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 攻击敌人。\n发动暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使攻击力最高的友军发动<color=#28d9ed>夹攻</color>。

true_desc_levels.1: Has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to grant all allies increased <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, before attacking an enemy.\nWhen scoring a critical hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Silenced</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせた後、敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で、対象に<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 증가시킨 후 적을 공격합니다.\n치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color>을 부여합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>后,攻击敌人。 \n触发暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>沉默</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2: Has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to grant all allies increased <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, before attacking an enemy.\nWhen scoring a critical hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Silenced</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.2_jp: <color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせた後、敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>の確率で、対象に<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.2_kr: <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 증가시킨 후 적을 공격합니다.\n치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color>을 부여합니다.

true_desc_levels.5: Has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to grant all allies increased <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>, before attacking an enemy.\nWhen scoring a critical hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Silenced</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
true_desc_levels.5_jp: <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間UPさせた後、敵単体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で、対象に<color=#28d9ed>沈黙</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.5_kr: <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 증가시킨 후 적을 공격합니다.\n치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>침묵</color>을 부여합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>后,攻击敌人。 \n触发暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>沉默</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

SKT_BURST_1.effect: +3 turns increased Critical Damage on allies
SKT_BURST_1.effect_jp: 会心ダメージUP+3ターン\n(味方全体)
SKT_BURST_1.effect_zh: 友军暴击伤害提升+3回合

SKT_BURST_2.effect_jp: 効果命中UP+3ターン\n(味方全体)
SKT_BURST_2.effect_zh: 全体友军效果命中提升+3回合

true_desc_levels.1:
Attacks all enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> on all targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
When scoring a critical hit on one or more enemies, has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>skill cooldowns</color> of all targets by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.

When attacking an <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monster</color>, increases <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> (Max 5 stacks).
true_desc_levels.1_jp:
敵全体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
このスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>スキルターン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>UPさせる。

 <color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>を攻撃時、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。(最大5回累積)
true_desc_levels.1_kr:
적 전체를 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 감소시킵니다.
한 명 이상의 적에게 치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>스킬 쿨타임</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가시킵니다. 


<color=#ffd732>이레귤러 몬스터</color> 공격 시 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> 증가시킵니다. (최대 5회 누적)
true_desc_levels.1_zh:
攻击全体敌人。有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使全体目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
对1名以上的敌人触发暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使全体目标的<color=#28d9ed>技能冷却时间</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

攻击<color=#ffd732>异型怪</color>时,使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>(最多叠加5次)。
true_desc_levels.2:
Attacks all enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> on all targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
When scoring a critical hit on one or more enemies, has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>skill cooldowns</color> of all targets by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.

When attacking an <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monster</color>, increases <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> (Max 5 stacks).
true_desc_levels.2_jp:
敵全体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
このスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>スキルターン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>UPさせる。

 <color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>を攻撃時、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。(最大5回累積)

적 전체를 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 감소시킵니다.
한 명 이상의 적에게 치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>스킬 쿨타임</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가시킵니다.

对1名以上的敌人触发暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使全体目标的<color=#28d9ed>技能冷却时间</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

 <color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>を攻撃時、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。(最大5回累積)
true_desc_levels.3_kr:
적 전체를 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 감소시킵니다.
한 명 이상의 적에게 치명 공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> 확률로 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>스킬 쿨타임</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 증가시킵니다. 


<color=#ffd732>이레귤러 몬스터</color> 공격 시 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>관통력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> 증가시킵니다. (최대 5회 누적)
true_desc_levels.3_zh:
攻击全体敌人。有<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的几率使全体目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
对1名以上的敌人触发暴击时,有<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>的几率使全体目标的<color=#28d9ed>技能冷却时间</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

攻击<color=#ffd732>异型怪</color>时,使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>穿透力</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>(最多叠加5次)。
true_desc_levels.4:
Attacks all enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> on all targets for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
When scoring a critical hit on one or more enemies, has a <color=#28d9ed>85%</color> chance to increase the <color=#28d9ed>skill cooldowns</color> of all targets by <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.

When attacking an <color=#ffd732>Irregular Monster</color>, increases <color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>3%</color> (Max 5 stacks).
true_desc_levels.4_jp:
敵全体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
このスキルで会心が発生した場合、<color=#28d9ed>85%</color>の確率で、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>スキルターン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>UPさせる。

 <color=#ffd732>イレギュラーモンスター</color>を攻撃時、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3%</color>UPさせる。(最大5回累積)

true_desc_levels.1: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Marked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: Damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: <color=#ffd732>チェーン効果(汎用)</color>:攻撃後、対象単体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>標的</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color> の間付与する。\n\n<color=#ffd732>連携効果</color>:自分の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が高いほど連携攻撃で与えるダメージがUPする。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: <color=#ffd732>체인 컴패니언 효과</color> : 공격 후 대상 한 명에게 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>의 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>표식</color>을 부여합니다.\n\n<color=#ffd732>협공 효과</color> : 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 높을수록 피해량이 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: <color=#ffd732>连携技能自由顺序效果</color>:攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率对1名目标造成<color=#28d9ed>标记</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。\n\n<color=#ffd732>夹攻效果</color>:自身<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高,则伤害量越高。
true_desc_levels.2: <color=#ffd732>Chain Companion Effect</color>: After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Marked</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.\n\n<color=#ffd732>Dual Attack Effect</color>: Damage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color>.
